head.title: Page not found - Synadia
head.script: {"@context":"https:\/\/schema.org","@graph":[{"@type":"WebSite","@id":"https:\/\/synadia.nl\/#website","url":"https:\/\/synadia.nl\/","name":"Synadia","description":"Mission critical software for real world operations.","publisher":{"@id":"https:\/\/synadia.nl\/#organization"},"alternateName":"Synadia","potentialAction":[{"@type":"SearchAction","target":{"@type":"EntryPoint","urlTemplate":"https:\/\/synadia.nl\/?s={search_term_string}"},"query-input":{"@type":"PropertyValueSpecification","valueRequired":true,"valueName":"search_term_string"}}],"inLanguage":"en-US"},{"@type":"Organization","@id":"https:\/\/synadia.nl\/#organization","name":"Synadia","alternateName":"Synadia","url":"https:\/\/synadia.nl\/","logo":{"@type":"ImageObject","inLanguage":"en-US","@id":"https:\/\/synadia.nl\/#\/schema\/logo\/image\/","url":"https:\/\/synadia.nl\/wp-content\/uploads\/2025\/11\/Logo-Synadia-groen-beeldmerk.png","contentUrl":"https:\/\/synadia.nl\/wp-content\/uploads\/2025\/11\/Logo-Synadia-groen-beeldmerk.png","width":878,"height":878,"caption":"Synadia"},"image":{"@id":"https:\/\/synadia.nl\/#\/schema\/logo\/image\/"},"sameAs":["https:\/\/www.linkedin.com\/company\/synadia\/","https:\/\/www.youtube.com\/channel\/UCJnRgkmuy1KvkSKOL9UOYUg"],"email":"info@synadia.nl","legalName":"Synadia Software b.v.","foundingDate":"2016-12-16","vatID":"NL857033037B01","taxID":"NL857033037B01","numberOfEmployees":{"@type":"QuantitativeValue","minValue":"51","maxValue":"200"}}]}
